title: Add keyboard send (Enter key) and Send button to message input

requirements.text: In the ConversationView component, update the message input area so that pressing the Enter key (without Shift) submits and sends the message, while Shift+Enter inserts a newline.

quotes: Add keyboard and send tab to message

acceptanceCriteria: Pressing Enter in the message input field sends the message without requiring a button click.
Pressing Shift+Enter inserts a newline in the message input instead of sending.
After sending via Enter, the input field is cleared.

requirements.text: In the ConversationView component, ensure a visible 'Send' button is displayed alongside the message input. The button must be clearly styled and clickable to submit the message, consistent with the Arena neon dark theme.

quotes: Add keyboard and send tab to message

acceptanceCriteria: A Send button is visible next to the message text input at all times.
Clicking the Send button submits the current message.
The Send button is disabled when the input is empty.
After sending via the button, the input field is cleared and focus returns to the input.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
Preserve existing message sending logic and React Query mutations in ConversationView.
nonGoals: Changing backend messaging API or data models.
Adding emoji picker or file attachment to the message input.
Modifying the conversation list panel layout.
